title: Italian-Style Lasagne
description: A classic Italian dish made with layers of lasagne sheets, rich meat sauce, and melted mozzarella cheese. This recipe is perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Cook the lasagne sheets according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook the minced beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the onion, garlic, and dried oregano to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the savory tomato sauce and bring to a simmer.
In a large bowl, combine the fluffy ricotta cheese and grated mozzarella cheese.
Spread a layer of the meat sauce in the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagne sheets on top of the meat sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta cheese mixture over the lasagne sheets.
Repeat the layers, starting with the meat sauce, then the lasagne sheets, and finally the remaining ricotta cheese mixture.
Top the lasagne with the grated mozzarella cheese and fresh basil.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
